prompt_md: Arrange the steps of **one disciplined vibe-coding iteration** in the correct order — from deciding what you want to safely landing the change. The items below are shown shuffled.

items: Run it (and the tests) to see what the change actually does
Write a clear intent/spec: the behaviour, inputs, outputs, and edge cases you want
Review the diff and commit the working state to version control
Read the generated diff and make sure you understand every line before accepting it
Send a small, focused prompt for one change at a time
